framework.name: The 'USB-C Moment' for AI
framework.description: MCP represents a standardization inflection point analogous to USB-C for hardware - moving from custom integrations (different wires for each device) to a unified interface. This centralized development of integrations (e.g., Yahoo Finance builds one MCP server) rather than thousands of developers each writing custom code.
framework.raw_quote: that USBC moment has arrived for AI and that is your model context protocol
